mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT p.product_id AS productId, p.product_name AS productName, p.price AS price, p.region_id AS regionId, region.code_contents AS regionName, t.theme_name AS themeName, pi.image_name AS imageName, ( SELECT AVG(r.rating) FROM review r JOIN product_schedule ps ON r.schedule_id = ps.schedule_id WHERE ps.product_id = p.product_id AND r.review_status = 100 ) AS averageRating FROM travel_product p LEFT JOIN theme t ON p.theme_code = t.theme_code LEFT JOIN status_type region ON region.bcode = 510 AND region.mcode = p.region_id LEFT JOIN product_image pi ON pi.product_id = p.product_id AND pi.img_order = 1 WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM review r JOIN product_schedule ps ON r.schedule_id = ps.schedule_id WHERE ps.product_id = p.product_id AND r.review_status = 100 ) ORDER BY averageRating DESC, p.product_id DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT p.product_id AS productId, p.product_name AS productName, p.price AS price, p.region_id AS regionId, region.code_contents AS regionName, t.theme_name AS themeName, pi.image_name AS imageName, ( SELECT AVG(r.rating) FROM review r JOIN product_schedule ps ON r.schedule_id = ps.schedule_id WHERE ps.product_id = p.product_id AND r.review_status = 100 ) AS averageRating FROM travel_product p LEFT JOIN theme t ON p.theme_code = t.theme_code LEFT JOIN status_type region ON region.bcode = 510 AND region.mcode = p.region_id LEFT JOIN product_image pi ON pi.product_id = p.product_id AND pi.img_order = 1 ORDER BY p.reg_date DESC, p.product_id DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3
